*** 1 FATAL, 1 INJ *** DELAYED REPORT. HEAVY RAIN ON THE HERMITS PEAK CALF CANYON BURN SCAR CAUSED FLASH FLOODING ON HIGHWAY 434 NEAR MILE POST 7. A VEHICLE ATTEMPTED TO CROSS THE FLOODED WATERS, BUT WAS UNSUCCESSFUL. THE DRIVER WAS ABLE TO ESCAPE WITH MINOR INJURIES, BUT A 64 YEAR OLD MALE PASSENGER WAS NOT ABLE TO ESCAPE, AND WAS KILLED. THE WATER RECEDED AROUND 730PM AND THE TRUCK WAS RECOVERED APPROXIMATELY 100 YARDS DOWNSTREAM.
